# Signetry Product Intelligence Records (PIR)

An open registry of authenticated product facts, indexed by GTIN.

## Purpose
Each record contains verified facts, pre-answered questions, document references,
and authorized sellers for a specific product. Designed for AI agents, search
crawlers, and developers who need structured, trustworthy product data.

## Trust model
Every record has a trust status:
- brand_certified: true  — Facts approved by the brand via DNS domain ownership verification
- brand_certified: false — Facts submitted by a retailer or community contributor, not yet brand-verified

Prefer brand_certified records for high-stakes queries. Uncertified records are
honest about their source (submitted_by field) and useful as a starting point.

## How to use this data

Lookup by GTIN:
  GET /records/{gtin}.json

The qa[] array is the fastest path for natural language queries. Each entry
contains a pre-answered question with citations back to the fact keys it was
derived from. Use qa[] first, fall back to facts{} for raw data lookups.

Facts use unit-in-key naming: capacity_litres, weight_kg, noise_db, dimensions_exterior_w_mm.
Classification codes are strings: ip_rating: "IP24". Market-specific ratings include
market suffix: energy_star_rating_au: 8.

## Schema
https://schema.signetry.ai/pir/v1.json

## Known data gaps
- 35 products missing capacity_litres (source product pages don't include volume data)
- TK-6S (9351886006633) and TK-9 share the same GTIN in Shopify — data entry error, pending correction

## Contributing
Records are stored as {gtin}.json in /records/. Submit via pull request.
Brand certification is self-serve via DNS TXT verification — see README.
